query: DynamoDB ecosystem and tooling for real-time analytics
answer: DynamoDB supports real-time analytics via integration with AWS tools like SageMaker Lakehouse and DynamoDB Streams for near real-time data processing. Tinybird offers high-throughput streaming for real-time analytics. Tools like Strands Agents SDK enable real-time data access.
